title: frangula rubra
intro: Frangula rubra, also known as Red Alder Buckthorn, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. It contains anthraquinone glycosides, particularly frangulin and franguloside, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, particularly for treating constipation and digestive issues. The health benefits of Frangula rubra include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, reduce inflammation, and improve liver function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Frangula rubra can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
